$description: Planet B motion tokens — from docs/06-motion-principles.md. Animate only transform & opacity (60fps). Every value has a reduced-motion path.

signatures.the-breath: Earth/eye scales 1.0→1.03 over breath duration, ease-in-out, infinite. The heartbeat.
signatures.waste-to-art: Scroll-linked convergence of material fragments into an artwork; static before/after fallback under reduced-motion.
signatures.the-reveal: rise(24px)+fade, once on enter; stagger children 50ms.
signatures.the-watch: single tick on the Reflection beat, then still.

reduced_motion.policy: When prefers-reduced-motion: reduce — disable loops & scroll-scenes, replace with cross-fades/instant states. The emotional arc still reads as a quiet sequence.
